REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (179 Ticker Ave, S.F. Ca.)
Off Calendar Apr-16-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Harbour for Tiffani Tamaru (Administrator).

The sale was confirmed at $360,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). Proceeds from the sale are to be deposited into a blocked account. Status on filing of the receipt for blocked account was set for May 7, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Gomez.
